YUWANCARD-PIG_HURT.title: Pig Hurt
YUWANCARD-PIG_THINK.title: Pig Think
YUWANCARD-PIG_ANGRY.title: Pig Angry
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLEEP.title: Pig Sleep
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLEEP.description:
End your turn
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP
YUWANCARD-PIG_SACRIFICE.title: Pig Sacrifice
YUWANCARD-PIG_SACRIFICE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Give all HP and Block to target teammate.|Give 50% of HP and Block to target teammate.}
YUWANCARD-PIG_DOUBT.title: Pig Doubt
YUWANCARD-NYJK.title: Now You Just Kried
YUWANCARD-NYJK.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to an enemy and remove 50% of its [gold]Block[/gold].
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.title: Give You
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.description: Choose a card from your hand and give it to target teammate.
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose 1 card from hand to give to teammate
YUWANCARD-WYJK.title: Now I Just Kried
YUWANCARD-MELANCHOLY_RABBIT.title: Melancholy Rabbit
YUWANCARD-MELANCHOLY_RABBIT.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current HP.
YUWANCARD-SAD_ARMY_WIN.title: Sad Army Win
YUWANCARD-SAD_ARMY_WIN.description: When your HP is below 10% of max HP, instantly win the current combat.
YUWANCARD-REVIVE_KAI.title: Revive Kai
YUWANCARD-REVIVE_KAI.description: Revive a dead teammate and restore them to {IfUpgraded:show:100%|50%} max HP.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK.description: Set all players HP to 25% of max, gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold], double current energy. For the next {RainDarkPower:diff()} turns: gain double energy, draw to full hand. Restore [gold]6[/gold] HP after combat.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_SELECT.title: Rain Dark Select
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_SELECT.description: Add a [gold]Rain Dark[/gold] to your hand.
YUWANCARD-TEN_THOUSAND_SWORDS.title: Ten Thousand Swords
YUWANCARD-TEN_THOUSAND_SWORDS.descriptio: Stack other players' [gold]Forge[/gold] onto yourself, then clear other players' [gold]Forge[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH_FISH.title: Pig Touch Fish
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH_FISH.description: Keep your hand next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY.title: Pig Bankruptcy
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY.description: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn and gain [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHARGE.title: Pig Charge
YUWANCARD-PIG_MULTI_SHOT.title: Pig Multi Shot
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHIELD_BREAK.title: Pig Shield Break
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHIELD_BREAK.description: Remove 50% of an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.title: Pig King
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.description: Choose 3 cards from hand to [gold]transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded|}[gold]Pig Charge[/gold], [gold]Pig Multi Shot[/gold], [gold]Pig Shield Break[/gold]
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose 3 cards from hand to transform
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD.title: Pig Brain Overload
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] every {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} turns.
YUWANCARD-PIG_MELT.title: Pig Melt
YUWANCARD-PIG_DRAGON_RIDE.title: Pig Dragon Ride
YUWANCARD-PIG_CRASH.title: Pig Crash
YUWANCARD-PIG_CRASH.description: Deal {SelfDamage} damage to yourself, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG.title: You Are Pig
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG.description: Turn a teammate into a pig, giving them {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold] and {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold], end their turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BITE.title: Pig Bite
YUWANCARD-PIG_BITE.description: Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold], {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy. Turn into pig for 1 turn.
YUWANCARD-ALL_IN.title: All In
YUWANCARD-ALL_IN.description: Randomly play {Magic:diff()} cards from [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], they gain [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YUWANCARD-STEAL_CARD.title: Steal Card
YUWANCARD-STEAL_CARD.description: Choose 1 card from target teammate's [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it to your hand.
YUWANCARD-PULL_NET_CABLE.title: Pull Net Cable
YUWANCARD-PULL_NET_CABLE.description: Make target teammate be taken over by [gold]Vakuu[/gold] for the next {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} turns.
YUWANCARD-TIAO_JIAO.title: Tiao Jiao
YUWANCARD-TIAO_JIAO.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a teammate. Give them {TrainYouWellPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
YUWANCARD-DO_NOT_DIE.title: Do Not Die
YUWANCARD-DO_NOT_DIE.description: Restore a player to [green]{HealPercentage}%[/green] max HP. Give them {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PRESSURE_YOU.title: Pressure You
YUWANCARD-PRESSURE_YOU.description: Make a teammate lose 1 energy. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
YUWANCARD-STONE_CARRYING_KING.title: Stone Carrying King
YUWANCARD-STONE_CARRYING_KING.descriptio: Transform all cards in a teammate's hand into {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded|}[gold]Stones[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_STRIKE.title: Pig Strike
YUWANCARD-PIG_DEFEND.title: Pig Defend
YUWANCARD-PIG_INSPIRE.title: Pig Inspire
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHELTER.title: Pig Shelter
YUWANCARD-PIG_UNITY.title: Pig Unity
YUWANCARD-PIG_UNITY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each living teammate, all teammates gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_GUARD.title: Pig Guard
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS.title: Pig Friends
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS.description: Summon a [gold]Little Pig[/gold] when gaining a Power, upgrade every 2 stacks.
YUWANCARD-PIG_ENCOURAGE.title: Pig Encourage
YUWANCARD-PIG_CURSE.title: Pig Curse
YUWANCARD-PIG_BLESSING.title: Pig Blessing
YUWANCARD-PIG_SMASH.title: Pig Smash
YUWANCARD-PIG_TAUNT.title: Pig Taunt
YUWANCARD-PIG_RICE_MEAL.title: Pig Rice Meal
YUWANCARD-PIG_RICE_MEAL.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Transform all Status cards in your hand into {IfUpgraded:show:Pig Feed+|Pig Feed}.
YUWANCARD-PIG_FEED.title: Pig Feed
YUWANCARD-PIG_FEED.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Restore Little Pig's HP by {Heal:diff()}.
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH.title: Pig Touch
YUWANCARD-BUG_PIG.title: Bug Pig
YUWANCARD-BUG_PIG.description: Deal {BugPigDamage:diff()} damage. For each [red]ERROR[/red] in the log, deal {IfUpgraded:show:5|3} additional damage.
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHOP.title: Pig Chop
YUWANCARD-DIMENSION_SLASH.title: Dimension Slash
YUWANCARD-DIMENSION_SLASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Double all [gold]debuffs[/gold] on target enemy, then copy them to other enemies.
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING.title: Perfect Thing
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING.description: Gain 1 energy every {IfUpgraded:show:2|3} cards you play.
YUWANCARD-BLACK_HOLE.title: Black Hole
YUWANCARD-BLACK_HOLE.description: Exhaust any number of cards from your hand. Deal {Magic:diff()} damage for each card exhausted.
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG.title: Hacker Pig
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG.description: Choose 1 card from your hand and enchant it with [gold]Loyal[/gold].
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG.selectionScreenProm: Choose 1 card from hand to enchant with Loyal
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE.title: Blood Wheel Eye
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE.description: All cards gain Replay 1 for this combat.
YUWANCARD-PIG_REPLAY.title: Pig Replay
YUWANCARD-PIG_REPLAY.description: Add {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Replay[/gold] to a card in your hand.
YUWANCARD-PIG_REPLAY.selectionScreenProm: Add 1 Replay to a card in hand
YUWANCARD-PIG_STAY_UP_LATE.title: Pig Stay Up Late
YUWANCARD-PIG_STAY_UP_LATE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. When system time is 23:00-02:00, double damage and gain [gold]Weak[/gold].
YUWANCARD-MANY_PIGS.title: Many Pigs
YUWANCARD-PIG_RECHARGE.title: Pig Recharge
YUWANCARD-PIG_DEFECTION.title: Pig Defection
YUWANCARD-PIG_DEFECTION.description: Has a chance to convert a random enemy to your team.
YUWANCARD-LITTLE_REGENT.title: Little Regent
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLAM.title: Pig Slam
YUWANCARD-PIG_ROAR.title: Pig Roar
YUWANCARD-PIG_ROLL.title: Pig Roll
YUWANCARD-PIG_EAT.title: Pig Eat
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHARGE_UP.title: Pig Charge Up
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRENZY.title: Pig Frenzy
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRENZY.description: Deal {Repeat:diff()} instances of {Damage:diff()} damage to an enemy.
YUWANCARD-FAT_PIG.title: Fat Pig
YUWANCARD-PIG_RED_WARM.title: Pig Red Warm
YUWANCARD-PIG_BULLY.title: Pig Bully
YUWANCARD-PIG_BULLY.description: Deal {PigBullyDamage:diff()} damage. Deal {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} additional damage for each teammate.
YUWANCARD-TEN_DAY_ELBOW.title: Ten Day Elbow
YUWANCARD-PIG_VAMPIRIC.title: Pig Vampiric
YUWANCARD-PIG_VAMPIRIC.description: Heal {PigVampiricPower:diff()} HP whenever you play an Attack card this turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_COIN.title: Pig Coin
YUWANCARD-PIG_COIN.description: Gain {PigCoinPower:diff()} gold whenever you play a card. Lose 1 stack at the end of your turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BURGER.title: Pig Burger
YUWANCARD-PIG_BURGER.description: Heal {PigBurgerPower:diff()} HP at the end of combat.
YUWANCARD-KILLING_INTENT.title: Killing Intent
YUWANCARD-KILLING_INTENT.description: Your next {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} Attack cards deal double damage.
YUWANCARD-TRAGIC_MANDARIN_DUCK.title: Tragic Mandarin Duck
YUWANCARD-TRAGIC_MANDARIN_DUCK.descripti: Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, if you didn't play any Attack cards, lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-EMPERORS_NEW_PIG.title: Emperor's New Pig
YUWANCARD-EMPERORS_NEW_PIG.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Enemies cannot deal damage to you or apply debuffs.|Enemies cannot deal damage to you.}
YUWANCARD-PIG_MISS_YOU.title: Pig Miss You
YUWANCARD-PIG_MAKE_WISH.title: Pig Make Wish
YUWANCARD-PIG_MAKE_WISH.description: Choose up to {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} cards from {IfUpgraded:show:8|6} random cards to add to your hand.
YUWANCARD-PIG_MAKE_WISH.selectionScreenP: Choose cards to add to hand
YUWANCARD-PIG_TRIBULATION.title: Pig Tribulation
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT.title: Shield To Front
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT.description: Until this card is played, the player who dealt the least damage takes double damage from enemies, other players are immune to enemy attacks.
YUWANCARD-BRAVE_RIB.title: Brave Rib
YUWANCARD-BRAVE_RIB.description: Exhaust all cards from your hand, then draw until your hand is full.
YUWANCARD-JUSTICE_IRON_FIST.title: Justice Iron Fist
YUWANCARD-TURN_TO_SPECIMEN.title: Turn To Specimen
YUWANCARD-LOLICON.title: Lolicon
YUWANCARD-LOLICON.description:
Gain {LoliconPower:diff()} [gold]Lolicon[/gold].
Deal double damage to enemies taller than [blue]140[/blue]. When attacking enemies [blue]140[/blue] or shorter, take damage equal to the damage dealt.
YUWANCARD-PIG_TEAMMATE.title: Pig Teammate
YUWANCARD-PIG_TEAMMATE.description: Take all cards from target player's hand and all their energy. That player gains 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold]
YUWANCARD-PIG_PUDDING.title: Pig Pudding
YUWANCARD-TIRAMISU_PIG.title: Tiramisu Pig
YUWANCARD-PIG_SOUFFLE.title: Pig Soufflé
YUWANCARD-PIG_BLUEBERRY_CAKE.title: Pig Blueberry Cake
YUWANCARD-CHEF_PIG.description: At the start of each turn, choose 1 card from your hand to [gold]transform[/gold] into a random [gold]Food Pig[/gold] card.
YUWANCARD-HORIZON.title: Horizon
YUWANCARD-HORIZON.description: All cards cost 1 less this combat.
